query:
DELETE bw FROM boost_wins bw INNER JOIN (SELECT challenge_id, user_id, day, boost_id, MIN(id) AS keep_id FROM boost_wins GROUP BY challenge_id, user_id, day, boost_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) duplicates ON bw.challenge_id = duplicates.challenge_id AND bw.user_id = duplicates.user_id AND bw.day = duplicates.day AND bw.boost_id = duplicates.boost_id WHERE bw.id <> duplicates.keep_id;
ALTER TABLE `boost_wins` ADD CONSTRAINT `boost_wins_unique_award_idx` UNIQUE(`challenge_id`,`user_id`,`day`,`boost_id`);
